room.caption: [SacredTemple] ...
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(109) global.mapTeleport=0
abilSetRemove(0)
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvExGates)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(902) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)

instance.creationCode: stringToShow="A great beast came down from the heavens. Seemingly sent by the gods. It wandered the land, tearing it asunder beneath its impressive might." signSize=2 newDraw=1
stringToShow="The people rallied against the beast, which sent it into a frenzy. They cried out for help, for none could stop it." signSize=2 newDraw=1
stringToShow="The gods extended a hand of mercy and imprisoned the beast within a dark empty cage, where it now sleeps." signSize=2 newDraw=1
stringToShow="The beast lay cursed in its dark imprisonment, now awaiting its moment to rise again, eager and hungry for destruction." signSize=2 newDraw=1
stringToShow="It is said a song with the power to drive away nightmares can calm the beast. A song that could only be heard within ones dreams." signSize=2 newDraw=1
stringToShow="If one could find the magical instruments passed down through the ages to play the song, they could free the beast from its curse." signSize=2 newDraw=1
stringToShow="They now slumber, lost in time, awaiting for those that would bring them to perform their destiny." signSize=2 newDraw=1
stringToShow="I implore you, gamer. Free me from this wretched curse placed upon me by the disease which spreads across this land." signSize=2 newDraw=1

progCheck=9000000 image_angle=90
var instrCheck; instrCheck=string_char_at(global.eGateProg,1) if instrCheck="8" or instrCheck="9" instance_destroy()

progCheck=9000000 image_angle=90
var instrCheck; instrCheck=string_char_at(global.eGateProg,2) if instrCheck="8" or instrCheck="9" instance_destroy()

progCheck=9000000 image_angle=90
var instrCheck; instrCheck=string_char_at(global.eGateProg,3) if instrCheck="8" or instrCheck="9" instance_destroy()

progCheck=9000000
var instrCheck; instrCheck=string_char_at(global.eGateProg,4) if instrCheck="8" or instrCheck="9" instance_destroy()

progCheck=9000000
var instrCheck; instrCheck=string_char_at(global.eGateProg,5) if instrCheck="8" or instrCheck="9" instance_destroy()

progCheck=9000000
var instrCheck; instrCheck=string_char_at(global.eGateProg,6) if instrCheck="8" or instrCheck="9" instance_destroy()

progCheck=9000000
var instrCheck; instrCheck=string_char_at(global.eGateProg,7) if instrCheck="8" or instrCheck="9" instance_destroy()

progCheck=9000000 image_angle=90
var instrCheck; instrCheck=string_char_at(global.eGateProg,8) if instrCheck="8" or instrCheck="9" instance_destroy()

fallSpeed=-8 riseSpeed=-8 distMax=752 spriteChange=1 image_blend=make_color_rgb(100,100,255)
var instrCheck; instrCheck=string_char_at(global.eGateProg,1) if instrCheck!="8" and instrCheck!="9" instance_destroy()

fallSpeed=-8 riseSpeed=-8 distMax=752 spriteChange=1 image_blend=make_color_rgb(100,100,255)
var instrCheck; instrCheck=string_char_at(global.eGateProg,2) if instrCheck!="8" and instrCheck!="9" instance_destroy()

fallSpeed=-8 riseSpeed=-8 distMax=496 spriteChange=1 image_blend=make_color_rgb(100,100,255)
var instrCheck; instrCheck=string_char_at(global.eGateProg,3) if instrCheck!="8" and instrCheck!="9" instance_destroy()

fallSpeed=-8 riseSpeed=-8 distMax=496 spriteChange=1 image_blend=make_color_rgb(100,100,255)
var instrCheck; instrCheck=string_char_at(global.eGateProg,8) if instrCheck!="8" and instrCheck!="9" instance_destroy()
